validation: All twelve roots are exact, structurally exact, or topology-and-bounds exact. The recovered DejaVu atlas, even-odd N-gon glyph fill, zero-radius Curve Circle semantics, inclusive cumulative-row placement, Blender-style legacy curve pass-through, and exact Bottom Left text-box pivot make all six large UI variants topology-and-bounds exact. The legacy one-based material switch now reproduces Blender's subtract-one/wrap-by-max selector, making every evaluated panel face/material range exact, including the Checkbox Panel's socket.integer.001 range. Authored mode reconstructs the shared node base vtext.001 FBM/Wave/Ping-Pong micro-bump, the base plate's node base.001 normalized Noise/Bump graph, and exact constant socket/emission surfaces. Mesh Hooks run before Geometry Nodes, and open two-point Poly-to-Bezier conversion uses Blender's one-third-chord endpoint handles; Noodle Segment now matches Blender bounds within 0.000001. Controlled Blender/WebGL captures cover all seven surfaced roots and preserve silhouettes at 0.9481 to 0.9726 IoU for the six panels, with 0.0343 to 0.0432 pixel luminance MAE. Three.js lighting, bump derivatives, view transform, and rasterization remain explicitly measured renderer approximations.
